title: Epigeneium cacuminis
taxonomy: Epigeneium cacuminis belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It is a genus of flowering plants that consists of 20-30 species native to tropical Asia. Within the genus, Epigeneium cacuminis is classified as a terrestrial orchid that grows in the wild. The classification of Epigeneium cacuminis is based on its morphological characteristics, including its leaf shape, flower color, and growth habits. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Epigeneium cacuminis shares similarities with other orchids in terms of its flower structure and growth patterns.
